queries.question: What is the name and phone number of the applicant with the least years of experience?
queries.sql: Select name, phone FROM Applicants JOIN Experiences ON Applicants.id = Experiences.applicant_id ORDER BY years_of_experience  ASC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?phone WHERE {
  ?applicants a :Applicants .
  ?experiences a :Experiences .
  ?experiences p:hasApplicants ?applicants .
  ?applicants p:name ?name .
  ?applicants p:phone ?phone .
  ?experiences p:years_of_experience ?years_of_experience_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?years_of_experience_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who has completed the most projects and what is their email address?
queries.sql: Select name, email FROM Applicants JOIN Experiences ON Applicants.id = Experiences.applicant_id ORDER BY number_of_completed_projects  DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?email WHERE {
  ?applicants a :Applicants .
  ?experiences a :Experiences .
  ?experiences p:hasApplicants ?applicants .
  ?applicants p:name ?name .
  ?applicants p:email ?email .
  ?experiences p:number_of_completed_projects ?number_of_completed_projects_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_completed_projects_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the name and phone number of least experienced applicant.
What is the name and email of most experienced applicant.
